description:
Cross-platform desktop application for translation based on ChatGPT API.


v0.6.21
- Fix model-list fetching and translation failing on the desktop app when the API URL includes an explicit port (#1571). Every desktop request goes through the Tauri HTTP allow-scope, which used http://* / https://* patterns. URLPattern only matches those against default-port URLs, so any host with an explicit port (e.g. a local server at http://192.168.x.x:11434, or a host like https://example.com:1234) was rejected before the request was ever sent. The scope now uses http://*:* / https://*:*, matching URLs both with and without a port.
